data.title: Add Part C (shared artifact impact analysis) to epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## TDD Requirement
Part C structural tests from task 4934-7566 (test_pipeline_contains_part_c_section, test_pipeline_part_c_trigger_condition, test_pipeline_part_c_output_format) FAIL RED before this task runs. Add the Part C subsection; all 3 tests turn GREEN.

## Implementation Steps
Add a "### Part C: Shared Artifact Impact Analysis" subsection after "### Part B: Technical Approach Self-Review" in plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md.

Part C content must include:
1. Trigger detection: Part C activates only when any SC or Approach section references creating or modifying a file that is consumed by "2+ other files" outside its own directory. Use Grep/Glob to count consumers at trigger time.
2. Scanning instructions: use Grep/Glob to find all files referencing the artifact (path references, import statements, source/include directives). Tech-stack-agnostic.
3. Cross-referencing: for each discovered consumer, check whether it is covered by any success criterion. Set covered_by_SC: true/false.
4. Output: present raw list of (file_path, matching_line, covered_by_SC) tuples to downstream consumers. Do NOT curate or summarize — pass raw scan output.
5. Graceful degradation: if scan produces no results (artifact not yet in codebase), skip Part C and log why.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md: modify (add Part C subsection after Part B)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Part C section heading exists
  Verify: grep -q "^### Part C" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
- [ ] Part C trigger phrase present
  Verify: grep -q "2+ other files" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
- [ ] Part C output format includes covered_by_SC
  Verify: grep -q "covered_by_SC" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
- [ ] All structural tests GREEN (including 3 new Part C tests)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-epic-scrutiny-pipeline.sh
